_comment: Flat allowlist covers Linux, macOS, Windows, Android. Unused commands on wrong OS are harmless. Governance is enforced by bareguard Gate (0.4.x) wired via wireGate from bare-agent (0.10.x).
_paths_note: Single-owner model: the owner has full machine access; customers never get host tools (gated at ownerCheck in gate.js). allowed=['/'] lets the owner read/find/grep anywhere. Destructive *commands* (the denylist above) are PIN-gated, not the filesystem. denied[] is a defense-in-depth floor on the file TOOLS (read/find/grep) only — it fences the bot's OWN secret store and credentials so a content-injection-hijacked model can't read them back out (the app's internal loadConfig uses fs directly, not the gated tools, so this never self-locks the bot).
